---
title: "NIS2 Compliance"
description: "Expert NIS2 Directive compliance services including assessments, CHENIST Team as a Service, and gap analysis for essential and important entities across the EU."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>NIS2 <span class="gr">Compliance</span></h1>
    <p>Navigate the NIS2 Directive with confidence and ensure robust cybersecurity governance.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="NIS2 compliance monitoring dashboard"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>The directive is here.<br>Are you ready?</h2>
        <p>NIS2 introduces stringent cybersecurity requirements for essential and important entities across the EU. Our comprehensive services help you navigate compliance, strengthen your security posture, and maintain continuous regulatory alignment.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Check your NIS2 status</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Three services, one goal</h2>
    <p class="sub">Everything you need to achieve and maintain NIS2 compliance.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Assessments</h3><p>Comprehensive evaluation of your compliance status: scope determination, risk framework assessment, security controls, supply chain review, incident reporting, and compliance roadmap.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i><h3>CISO as a Service</h3><p>Strategic cybersecurity leadership without a full-time hire: compliance program management, board reporting, policy development, incident coordination, and vendor risk management.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i><h3>Gap Analysis</h3><p>Identify and prioritize gaps between your current posture and NIS2 requirements: current state documentation, risk-based prioritization, remediation planning, and cost-benefit analysis.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Assessment process</h2>
    <p class="sub">From scoping to compliance roadmap in four structured phases.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-search"></i><h3>Scoping Analysis</h3><p>Determine if your organization falls under NIS2 directive requirements.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-list-check"></i><h3>Controls Assessment</h3><p>Evaluate implementation of required security measures.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i><h3>Gap Identification</h3><p>Identify non-conformities and areas requiring improvement.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-map"></i><h3>Compliance Roadmap</h3><p>Develop an actionable plan to achieve and maintain compliance.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What NIS2 requires</h2>
    <p class="sub">Technical and organizational measures your entity must implement.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lock"></i><h3>Risk Analysis</h3><p>Information system security policies and risk management frameworks.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge"></i><h3>Incident Handling</h3><p>Business continuity, 24-hour reporting, and crisis management procedures.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i><h3>Supply Chain</h3><p>Supplier relationship security and third-party risk management.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-key"></i><h3>Access Control</h3><p>Cryptography, multi-factor authentication, and human resources security.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><h3>Governance</h3><p>Framework, security policies, and management body accountability.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Training</h3><p>Security awareness programs and staff education requirements.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i><h3>Testing</h3><p>Vulnerability assessments and regular security testing cycles.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><h3>Documentation</h3><p>Board-ready reporting and comprehensive compliance records.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Gap analysis phases</h2>
    <p class="sub">A structured five-phase approach to closing compliance gaps.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-1-circle"></i><h3>Current State Analysis</h3><p>Documentation review, stakeholder interviews, technical controls assessment. 1-2 weeks.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-2-circle"></i><h3>Gap Identification</h3><p>Map controls to NIS2 requirements, document non-conformities with evidence. 1 week.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-3-circle"></i><h3>Risk Prioritization</h3><p>Risk-based gap prioritization, impact analysis, quick win identification. 1 week.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-4-circle"></i><h3>Remediation Planning</h3><p>Detailed recommendations, phased roadmap, resource and budget requirements. 1-2 weeks.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-5-circle"></i><h3>Report Delivery</h3><p>Comprehensive report, executive summary, technical appendices, and stakeholder presentation. 1 week.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Who needs NIS2 compliance?</h2>
    <p class="sub">The directive applies across multiple sectors and entity types.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Energy</h3><p>Electricity, oil, gas, and hydrogen providers.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-truck"></i><h3>Transport</h3><p>Air, rail, water, and road operators.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><h3>Finance</h3><p>Banking and financial market infrastructures.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Health</h3><p>Healthcare providers and medical supply chains.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-droplet"></i><h3>Water</h3><p>Drinking water and wastewater management.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Cloud, data centers, CDNs, and DNS providers.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>Manufacturing</h3><p>Medical devices, electronics, machinery, and vehicles.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i><h3>Digital Providers</h3><p>Marketplaces, search engines, and social platforms.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Book your assessment</h2>
    <p class="sub">Start your NIS2 compliance journey with a free initial consultation.</p>
    <div class="m-form">
      <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
        <label for="name">Full Name *</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">

        <label for="email">Email Address *</label>
        <input type="email" class="form-control" id="email" name="email" required placeholder="your.email@company.com">

        <label for="company">Company Name *</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="company" name="company" required placeholder="Your company name">

        <label for="phone">Phone Number</label>
        <input type="tel" class="form-control" id="phone" name="phone" placeholder="+40 123 456 789">

        <label for="service">Service of Interest *</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="service" name="service" required>
          <option value="">Please select...</option>
          <option value="nis2-assessment">NIS2 Assessment</option>
          <option value="ciso-service">CISO as a Service</option>
          <option value="gap-assessment">Gap Assessment</option>
          <option value="multiple">Multiple Services</option>
          <option value="consultation">Initial Consultation</option>
        </select>

        <label for="sector">Industry Sector *</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="sector" name="sector" required>
          <option value="">Please select...</option>
          <option value="energy">Energy</option>
          <option value="transport">Transport</option>
          <option value="banking">Banking & Finance</option>
          <option value="healthcare">Healthcare</option>
          <option value="water">Water & Wastewater</option>
          <option value="digital">Digital Infrastructure</option>
          <option value="public-admin">Public Administration</option>
          <option value="manufacturing">Manufacturing</option>
          <option value="food">Food Production/Distribution</option>
          <option value="chemicals">Chemicals</option>
          <option value="digital-provider">Digital Service Provider</option>
          <option value="other">Other</option>
        </select>

        <label for="company-size">Company Size</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="company-size" name="company-size">
          <option value="">Please select...</option>
          <option value="1-50">1-50 employees</option>
          <option value="51-250">51-250 employees (Medium)</option>
          <option value="251-1000">251-1000 employees (Large)</option>
          <option value="1000+">1000+ employees (Enterprise)</option>
        </select>

        <label for="timeline">Desired Timeline</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="timeline" name="timeline">
          <option value="">Please select...</option>
          <option value="urgent">Urgent (within 1 month)</option>
          <option value="short-term">Short-term (1-3 months)</option>
          <option value="medium-term">Medium-term (3-6 months)</option>
          <option value="long-term">Long-term (6+ months)</option>
          <option value="planning">Just planning/researching</option>
        </select>

        <label for="message">Additional Information</label>
        <textarea class="form-control" id="message" name="message" rows="4" placeholder="Tell us about your specific needs, challenges, or questions regarding NIS2 compliance..."></textarea>

        <div class="form-check" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
          <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" id="privacy-consent" name="privacy-consent" required>
          <label class="form-check-label" for="privacy-consent">
            I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> and consent to being contacted regarding my inquiry *
          </label>
        </div>

        <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New NIS2 Service Inquiry">
        <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">

        <button type="submit" class="m-b" style="width: 100%; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 1rem; font-size: 1.05rem;">
          Request Consultation
        </button>
      </form>
      <p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;" class="m-sm">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Your information is secure and will only be used to respond to your inquiry.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need immediate<br>assistance?</h2>
    <p>Our NIS2 compliance experts are ready to help you navigate the requirements.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Schedule a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free consultation &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No obligation &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Expert guidance
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
